description_long: This barn features a modern, minimalist design with a steep gable roof and clean, rectangular form. The exterior is clad in vertical wooden siding, giving it a contemporary yet rustic appearance. One side of the barn includes a covered porch or deck area with two lounge chairs, suggesting a space for relaxation or observation. Large windows are present on both the side and the gable end, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The main entrance is a simple rectangular opening, and the structure sits on a dark, solid base. The overall look is sleek and functional, blending traditional barn elements with modern architectural sensibilities.
description: A modern barn with a steep gable roof, vertical wood siding, large windows, and a covered porch with lounge chairs.
description_view_0: Side view showing the long vertical wood siding, a large horizontal window, and the covered porch area.
description_view_1: Gable end view highlighting the porch with two lounge chairs and a large window above.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with vertical wood siding and a large horizontal window, porch area visible at the left.
description_view_3: Rear gable end with a large window and the main entrance below, no porch visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: one large window on each gable end, one horizontal window on each long side
